name: Brain Test All-Star
author: Poki
description: Brain Test All-Star is back with all-new brain teasers to challenge even the most seasoned puzzle solvers! This latest installment of the hit puzzle game brings a fresh batch of tricky riddles and brain-busting puzzles, designed to test your wit and creativity. Reunite with fan-favorite characters like Agent Smith, Monster Hunter Joe, Uncle Bubba, Doctor Worry, and Tom the Cat as you tackle these tough challenges. Are you ready to put your brain to the ultimate test once again? How to play Brain Test All-Star? Use your mouse cursor or finger to select, drag and move objects around. Who created Brain Test All-Star? Brain Test All-Star is created by Unico Studio. Play their other games on Poki: Brain Test: Tricky Puzzles , Brain Test 2: Tricky Stories , Brain Test 3: Tricky Quests , Brain Test 4: Tricky Friends , Brain Test: Tricky Words , Who Is? , Who is? 2 Brain Puzzle & Chats , Life Choices: Life Simulator , Word City Crossed , Word City Uncrossed , Word City Uncrossed , Word Match , Popular Words , Nuts and Bolts: Screwing Puzzle , and Word Monsters !! How can I play Brain Test All-Star for free? You can play Brain Test All-Star for free on Poki. Can I play Brain Test All-Star on mobile devices and desktop? Brain Test All-Star can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
